params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Nest (living area). Focus tightly on: sofa, coffee table, area rug, standing_desk, bookshelf, low linen sofa, sculptural wooden coffee table, visible bay/front windows, low linen sofa (scaled for 11.9' x 11.7'), bookshelf with baskets, textured area rug, floor lamp (warm 2700–3000K). Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A calm, uncluttered Japandi interior that balances Scandinavian restraint with Japanese warmth. Warm neutrals, light oak, and sculptural minimal furniture create a grounded, family-friendly environment. Prioritize a cozy standing-desk work corner in the main living area, low-profile seating, and textured natural materials. Maintain visible-source lighting logic and faithful architecture in all outputs. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
